title: poa astonii var. oraria
intro: Poa astonii var. oraria, also known as the alpine fescue, is a rare and unique variety of grass native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Poa astonii var. oraria include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
